---
title: "Abietinaria abietina"
subtitle: "ABAB"
alternate_codes: []
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ["", ""]
common_name: "Sea fir"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
date: ""
date-format: " "
description: ""
image: '/header_images/82275_abietinaria-abietina_Picton_Bernard.jpg'
categories:
  - hydrozoans
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 11001000
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 117870
---

![](/header_images/82275_abietinaria-abietina_Picton_Bernard.jpg)  
Photo from Bernard Picton via [WORMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=82275&tid=117870)

**Link to Unknown ID Page:** Unknown hydroid.

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Erect hydroid with very defined pinnate brances. Looks very coarse given the very obvious branching.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=117870)**
